description: Reliable combat income through tank, capacitor, and weapon foundations.
recommended_for: Pilots who want predictable PvE income.

required_skills.name: Power Grid Management
required_skills.reason: Fitting room for practical PvE ships.

required_skills.name: Capacitor Management
required_skills.economic_impact: Fewer lost ships and fewer failed missions.

optional_skills.name: Gunnery
optional_skills.economic_impact: Faster mission clears if using turrets.

warnings: Do not rush battleships before fitting, tank, and capacitor skills are solid.
